_notes: Hand-curated by reading the US Core AllergyIntolerance differential (7 elements) line by line against the R4 AllergyIntolerance snapshot. Key R4 facts: clinicalStatus min=0 required:allergyintolerance-clinical|4.0.1 (version-pinned); verificationStatus min=0 required:allergyintolerance-verification|4.0.1 (version-pinned); code min=0 example:allergyintolerance-code; patient min=1 Reference(Patient); reaction min=0; reaction.manifestation min=1 example:clinical-findings. All non-root diff elements have USCDI annotations.

drifts.description: MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Binding version pin removed: R4 binds to 'allergyintolerance-clinical|4.0.1' (version-locked). US Core binds to 'allergyintolerance-clinical' (no version pin). Strength remains required in both.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to AllergyIntolerance.clinicalStatus in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).

Binding version pin removed: R4 binds to 'allergyintolerance-verification|4.0.1' (version-locked). US Core binds to 'allergyintolerance-verification' (no version pin). Strength remains required in both.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to AllergyIntolerance.verificationStatus in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Code becomes mandatory in US Core; R4 allows an AllergyIntolerance without a code.
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).

Binding changed: R4 uses example strength to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergyintolerance-code. US Core tightens to extensible strength with http://cts.nlm.nih.gov/fhir/ValueSet/2.16.840.1.113762.1.4.1186.8 (US-specific allergy substance codes). Binding strength tightened: example -> extensible.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to AllergyIntolerance.code in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).
Reference target profile constrained: R4 allows Reference(Patient). US Core restricts to Reference(us-core-patient), requiring a US Core-profiled patient.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to AllergyIntolerance.patient in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to AllergyIntolerance.reaction in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).

Binding strength tightened: R4 uses example strength to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/clinical-findings. US Core tightens to extensible strength with the same ValueSet (http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/clinical-findings). ValueSet URL unchanged; only strength tightened: example -> extensible.

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to AllergyIntolerance.reaction.manifestation in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
